**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Jiangyin Jiangnan Automobile Decoration Goods Co., Ltd. presents another case of severe field shifting/corruption in its registry data. Forensic reconstruction reveals a highly classic 'Sunan Model' (Southern Jiangsu) township enterprise established in 1988. Originally named 'Jiangyin Resin Factory', it specialized in plastic injection molding. The extracted business scope—ranging from auto plastic interior parts and plastic doors/windows to 'pet products'—confirms its core capability: basic plastic mold injection. Despite the 3 million RMB paid-in capital, the corrected workforce data indicates 0 insured employees. The company email domains (@jymosu.com) point to the massive 'Jiangyin Moulding Group' ecosystem. This entity is conclusively a dormant legacy plastic injection factory from the 1980s, currently inactive but retaining its corporate shell, potentially subsumed by larger local molding conglomerates or leasing out its legacy plant.
